files_changed.old_behaviour: arithmetic mean of soldComps as base; base × capped generic discount; fixed ±5% backend band; acquisition costs (SDLT, premium, legal, bridging) computed inside engine; disconnected _true_waterfall final_value vs ceiling_range; confidence heuristic uncapped at 0.95 in services vs 0.60 in root
files_changed.new_behaviour: weighted_median(adjusted_value_i, weight_i) from sold comparables within 0.5 miles only as primary base; base × product(1 - value_adjustment_i) legal-pack property-value risk adjustment; deterministic uncertainty band (0.05–0.20) from comp count and confidence caps; acquisition costs (SDLT, buyer premium, legal fees, bridging) fully excluded from ceiling formula; single canonical output object with valuation_range, comparables.valid/excluded, legal_pack_value_risks, confidence.caps, audit.formula_trace; minimum_required_comps=3, preferred_required_comps=5; ceiling_range retained as legacy-compat integer mirror of valuation_range

files_changed.old_behaviour: stale diverged copy of ceiling engine; different confidence formula; no override_discount_pct; silently importable as alternative engine
files_changed.new_behaviour: raises ImportError immediately on import with message directing to services.ceiling_engine; cannot be used accidentally; deprecated stub only

files_changed.old_behaviour: called _calc_ceiling with comps_avg_value (mean) injected into financial_inputs; no sold_comps list passed; no subject dict passed
files_changed.new_behaviour: builds subject dict from result.property (type, tenure, lease_length, internal_area, condition); passes sold_comps=_comps (full comp objects) and subject=_subject to _calc_ceiling; fallback_allowed=True; logs status and confidence_final

files_changed.old_behaviour: injected comps_avg_value (mean) into _fins_inputs; no sold_comps or subject passed to _calc_ceiling
files_changed.new_behaviour: builds _subject_rc from summary_json.property; passes sold_comps=_comps (full objects) and subject=_subject_rc; comps_avg_value injection removed

files_changed.old_behaviour: no sold_comps or subject passed to _calc_ceiling; used canonical_base_valuation only as comps_avg_value override
files_changed.new_behaviour: extracts _wb_comps from area_json.housing.soldComps; builds _wb_subject from summary_json.property; passes both to _calc_ceiling; canonical base_valuation override still honoured when deal_id present

files_changed.old_behaviour: mutated canonical ceiling_range.low and ceiling_range.high client-side: bandPct = 0.10 - (resolvePct × 0.06); applied ±4–10% dynamic band over backend response
files_changed.new_behaviour: canonical ceiling_range values passed through unchanged; _resolved_pct tracked for display only; frontend does not alter low/high

files_changed.old_behaviour: read c.confidence as scalar; stale 0.60 INVARIANT comment; _band_pct note from client-side mutation; hardcoded label thresholds inconsistent with engine
files_changed.new_behaviour: reads c.confidence.final (new engine) with fallback to scalar (legacy); reads c.valuation_range.uncertainty_band for display; uses engine-supplied c.confidence.label; anchor method map includes weighted_median_relational_comparables_0_5_mile
prefers c.legal_pack_value_risks.risks[] with value_adjustment > 0 (new engine); falls back to c.drivers[] for legacy responses
reads c.valuation_range first (new engine); falls back to c.ceiling_range for legacy responses; lo/hi extraction unchanged
reads _sjCeil.valuation_range first (new engine); falls back to ceiling_range for legacy; base_valuation fallback also checks _sjCeil.base.value
26 deterministic tests covering all 13 required behaviours; all pass

canonical_backend_object: services/ceiling_engine.py:calculate_ceiling() returns: { valuation_type, not_rics_valuation, status, base.{method,value,minimum_required_comps,preferred_required_comps,valid_comparable_count,excluded_comparable_count}, comparables.{radius_miles,valid[],excluded[]}, legal_pack_value_risks.{method,adjustment_factor,adjusted_value,risks[]}, valuation_range.{low,midpoint,high,uncertainty_band}, confidence.{raw,caps[],final,label}, audit.{assumptions,evidence_gaps,warnings,formula_trace,version}, ceiling_range(legacy compat), base_valuation(legacy compat), acquisition_costs=None, excluded_from_ceiling[] }

tests.name: test_outside_radius_excluded
tests.evidence: comps at 0.51 and 1.0 miles appear in excluded; valid_comparable_count=2

tests.name: test_all_outside_radius_is_insufficient
tests.evidence: status=insufficient_evidence; midpoint=None

tests.name: test_no_arithmetic_mean
tests.evidence: base=100k not 280k (arithmetic mean of skewed distribution); base.method=weighted_median_relational_comparables_0_5_mile

tests.name: test_weighted_median_deterministic
tests.evidence: equal weights → median; heavy weight at low → low value; heavy at high → high value

tests.name: test_weighted_median_no_positive_weights
tests.evidence: empty list, zero weight, negative weight all return None

tests.name: test_duplicate_exclusion
tests.evidence: second '1 High St' in excluded with reason=duplicate_address; valid_count=3

tests.name: test_tenure_mismatch_excluded
tests.evidence: leasehold comp excluded when subject is freehold; excluded reasons contain tenure_mismatch

tests.name: test_tenure_unknown_caps_confidence
tests.evidence: confidence ≤ 0.45 when subject.tenure is None

tests.name: test_non_adjacent_lease_band_excluded
tests.evidence: lease_band 20-40 comp excluded (non-adjacent to 60-80 subject); adjacent 80-99 included; valid_count=3

tests.name: test_short_lease_no_same_band_caps_confidence
tests.evidence: confidence ≤ 0.35; caps contain short_lease or 80 reference

tests.name: test_legal_pack_value_risk_affects_midpoint

tests.name: test_legal_pack_risk_product_formula
tests.evidence: (1-0.10)×(1-0.06) = 0.846 matches _legal_pack_adjustment_factor output

tests.name: test_legal_pack_risk_capped_at_35pct
tests.evidence: 10 critical flags still produce factor ≥ 0.65

tests.name: test_acquisition_costs_excluded_from_ceiling
tests.evidence: buyer premium / SDLT / legal fee flags produce same midpoint as clean; acquisition_costs=None

tests.name: test_canonical_ceiling_values_unchanged
tests.evidence: valuation_range.low = round(mid×(1-u),2); ceiling_range.low = int(round(valuation_range.low))

tests.name: test_audit_completeness
tests.evidence: formula_trace, warnings, evidence_gaps, assumptions non-empty; version correct; risks have risk_id, value_adjustment, included, reason

tests.name: test_existing_ceiling_connected_to_valuation_result
tests.evidence: calculate_ceiling returns valuation_range.midpoint ≠ None; valuation_type = red_book_style_paper_valuation_similarity

tests.name: test_root_ceiling_engine_raises
tests.evidence: ImportError raised when root ceiling_engine.py is loaded directly

tests.name: test_discount_calibration_deterministic
tests.evidence: critical=0.10, high=0.06, medium=0.035, low=0.015, note=0.00, missing=0.025, cap=0.35

tests.name: test_uncertainty_band_deterministic
tests.evidence: 5 comps → 0.05; 3 comps → 0.08; 1 comp → 0.13; multi-cap ≤ 0.20

tests.name: test_min_required_comps
tests.evidence: MIN_REQUIRED_COMPS=3, PREFERRED_COMPS=5

tests.name: test_insufficient_evidence_below_min_comps_no_fallback
tests.evidence: 2 comps, fallback_allowed=False → status=insufficient_evidence; midpoint=None

tests.name: test_degraded_low_comps_with_fallback
tests.evidence: 2 comps, fallback_allowed=True → status=degraded_low_comps; midpoint non-None; confidence ≤ 0.50

tests.name: test_services_ceiling_engine_is_canonical
tests.evidence: VERSION=ceiling_relational_paper_valuation_v1; PRIMARY_RADIUS_MILES=0.5; MIN_REQUIRED_COMPS=3; PREFERRED_COMPS=5; all callables present

remaining_gaps: HPI time-adjustment data is not yet plumbed from the backend HPI pipeline into sold_comps[].hpi_adjustment — engine defaults to time_adjustment=1.00 with audit warning when absent; connect once area_json includes per-comp HPI factors
subject.condition is not currently extracted by the LLM analysis pipeline — defaults to 'unknown' (condition_adjustment=1.00); connect once LLM summary surfaces condition

_apply_audit_confidence_cap (T-4) in app.py still runs on /api/ceiling and _recompute paths — it now modifies confidence.final on the returned dict; should be updated to mutate confidence.final inside the confidence subobject rather than the top-level scalar; currently harmless because frontend reads confidence.final with scalar fallback
verification_statement: 26/26 tests pass. Backend owns canonical ceiling. services/ceiling_engine.py is the sole executed engine (app.py imports from services.ceiling_engine only). Root ceiling_engine.py raises ImportError. Primary comparable universe is 0.5 miles (PRIMARY_RADIUS_MILES=0.5). Base is weighted_median (arithmetic mean is not used). Legal-pack adjustment is product(1-value_adjustment_i) for property-value risks only. SDLT, buyer premium, legal fees, bridging, finance cost, investor margin excluded from ceiling formula (acquisition_costs=None). Uncertainty band is deterministic (0.05–0.20). Frontend workbench no longer mutates canonical ceiling_range values. Verdict and financials pages read valuation_range with ceiling_range legacy fallback.
